arts.ttl: Scotland concede 15 seconds after interval to go three down
arts.sum: Scotland concede in the opening seconds of the second as Christos Tzolis puts Greece three up at Hampden and 3-1 ahead on aggregate in the Nations League play-off. (Available to UK users only)

arts.ttl: Karetsas stunner gives Greece aggregate lead over Scotland
arts.sum: Seventeen-year-old Konstantinos Karetsas curls a fine strike into the top corner to put Scotland two down at Hampden and gave Greece the aggregate lead in the Nations League play-off. (Available to UK users only)

arts.ttl: BBC forced into grovelling apology seconds into crucial Scotland vs Greece clash
arts.sum: Scotland fans tuned into the BBC expecting live coverage of their key UEFA Nations League clash with Greece at Hampden Park but the channel were forced to issue an apology after technical issues

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson leads emotional Scotland tribute to Man Utd legend Denis Law
arts.sum: Scotland played Greece on Sunday in their first home game since the death of Denis Law in January and fans at Hampden Park paid tribute to the Manchester United legend

arts.ttl: Konstantelias levels tie for Greece with Hampden opener
arts.sum: Greece forward Giannis Konstantelias thumps in the opener at Hampden to level the Nations League play-off with Scotland at 1-1 on aggregate. (Available to UK users only)

arts.ttl: BBC in grovelling Scotland vs Greece apology over missing commentary and things get worse when it comes back on
arts.sum: The Tartan Army tuning in for the first Hampden match live on the BBC were left in disbelief by a string of audio errors

arts.ttl: Scotland v Greece, Spain v Netherlands, Germany v Italy, and more: Nations League – live
arts.sum: Portugal v Denmark, France v Croatia also playing You can email John with your thoughts Goalflash: Iceland 1-0 Kosovo (Okarsson, 2) (2-2 aggregate) 1 min: The Hampden Roar gets us underway. The BBC coverage is lacking commentary which is fun. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Scotland vs. Greece team news: Starting lineups confirmed for crucial UEFA Nations League playoff
arts.sum: Scotland and Greece announce their starting lineups for the second leg of their UEFA Nations League playoff tie at Hampden Park.

arts.ttl: Scotland vs Greece LIVE as Lewis Ferguson drops out with surprise Hampden switcheroo by Sir Steve
arts.sum: Scotland's Nations League fate will be decided tonight at Hampden as Greece look to overturn a 1-0 deficit

arts.ttl: Scotland vs Greece LIVE: Steve Clarke’s side bid to avoid relegation in Nations League play-off
arts.sum: The Scots hold a one-goal advantage after winning the first leg away from home
